title: Hat-trick Menze stars for Birds
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Safa Eden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Safa Eden Regional League 2022/23 season title winners Oriented Birds got three vital points away from home when they beat Royal Blues 3-2 in a Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League fixture on Saturday 1 February at Rustdene Stadium in Beaufort West.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Safa Eden Regional League 2022/23 season title winners Oriented Birds got three vital points away from home when they beat Royal Blues 3-2 in a Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League fixture on Saturday 1 February at Rustdene Stadium in Beaufort West."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Star of game","html":"Star of game"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lakhiwe Menze (17) of the Birds was the star of the game, scoring a hat-trick.","html":"Lakhiwe Menze (17) of the Birds was the star of the game, scoring a hat-trick."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With 20 points, the Birds are in second place in the WC ABC Motsepe league log, and are fighting for a play-off spot in the provincial competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds have played 10 games, winning six, drawing two, and losing two.","html":"The Birds have played 10 games, winning six, drawing two, and losing two."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Central Karoo Region's Royal Blues are in the third place, with 17 points.","html":"Central Karoo Region's Royal Blues are in the third place, with 17 points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Difficult situation","html":"Difficult situation"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the difficult situation of playing in their opponents' back yard, where spectators put pressure on visiting teams, the Birds scored two important goals in the first half - putting pressure on Royal Blues' back line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half saw the home team on fire, creating opportunities as they searched for their first goal.","html":"The second half saw the home team on fire, creating opportunities as they searched for their first goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After putting sustained pressure on the Birds, they managed to hit the back of the net twice.","html":"After putting sustained pressure on the Birds, they managed to hit the back of the net twice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dying moments","html":"Dying moments"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the dying moments of the game, Menze launched a dangerous attack and, after placing the Royal Blues back line under threat, scored his third, winning goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Khanyisani Radebe, the Birds skipper, told the Knysna-Plett Herald that playing away from home \"is always very difficult when everyone is supporting the home team\".","html":"Khanyisani Radebe, the Birds skipper, told the Knysna-Plett Herald that playing away from home \"is always very difficult when everyone is supporting the home team\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It was a very sunny, hot day in Beaufort West, but as a team we managed to get a positive result in a tight situation,\" Radebe said.","html":"\"It was a very sunny, hot day in Beaufort West, but as a team we managed to get a positive result in a tight situation,\" Radebe said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
